trigger_question_examples: Can you describe what the vomit looked like?
Was there any blood or dark material in what you vomited?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It looked like wet coffee grounds, dark and grainy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two episodes of black, tarry, foul-smelling stool (melaena) in the last 4 hours
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in the colour of your stools?
Have your bowel motions been black or tarry?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've had two lots of black, sticky, really smelly stools in the last few hours.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe dizziness and near-fainting on standing (postural presyncope)
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint when you stand up?
How do you feel when you sit or stand compared to lying down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I nearly blacked out standing up from the toilet, it's much worse than just lying still.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Heavy alcohol intake and occasional over-the-counter ibuprofen use
trigger_question_examples: Do you drink alcohol regularly, and if so how much?
Have you taken any anti-inflammatory painkillers like ibuprofen recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I do drink quite a bit, more than I probably should, and yeah I've taken ibuprofen every now and then.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'd rather not get into the drinking, can we just focus on what's happening now?

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Should I try to get up and get a glass of water or something to eat?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Should firmly advise the patient to stay lying flat and not attempt to stand, sit, eat, or drink, given the presyncope and suspected significant blood loss, and should direct immediate emergency ambulance call rather than any home remedy.

deflection_behaviours.description: When asked about alcohol use, patient may initially deflect before answering, reflecting some embarrassment about drinking habits.
deflection_behaviours.deflection_text_template: I'd rather not get into the drinking, can we just focus on what's happening now?
